creator: bcran@FreeBSD.org
text:
The ERRORS section of the sctp manual pages contains a few mistakes in the first sentence. The attached patch corrects them.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: man sctp_bindx
man sctp_connectx
man sctp_getaddrlen
man sctp_getassocid
man sctp_getpaddrs
man sctp_opt_info
man sctp_send
man sctp_sendmsg
